_comment: Structured summary of each KPI dashboard route in the LMD portal (Next.js repo lmd-portal-UI, src/app/(protected)/kpi-dashboard/<route>/page.tsx). KPI/indicator names and theory-of-change levels are sourced from that repo's kpi-metadata.json. The dashboards embed Power BI reports, so the exact chart_types live inside Power BI and are approximate here. Keyed by route slug; update when dashboards change.

global-scale.title: Global Scale KPI Dashboard

Cross Cutting: Number of community and frontline health workers supported by Last Mile Health and its government partners to provide quality community-based primary healthcare services
Population of the communities with improved access to quality, community-based primary healthcare through Last Mile Health and its government partners
Number of women of reproductive age with improved access to modern family planning services through LMH-supported CHWs
Number of under-five children’s lives saved by CHWs supported by LMH (modeled estimates)

chart_types: Actuals-vs-target trend by fiscal year and quarter (Power BI line/column visuals)
Bar and line charts grouped by theory-of-change level

ethiopia.title: Ethiopia KPI Dashboard

Cross Cutting: Number of community and frontline health workers supported by Last Mile Health and its government partners to provide quality community-based primary healthcare services
Population of the communities with improved access to quality, community-based primary healthcare through Last Mile Health and its government partners
Strengthen: Ethiopia MOH institutionalizes LMH's blended learning approach for HEW integrated refresher training
Upskill: Number of community and frontline health workers who have completed a full blended learning training module
Total number of blended training module completions by community and frontline health workers
Percentage of HEWs and HEW Supervisors who have received a passing score in a post-training knowledge assessment
Percentage of HEWs and HEW Supervisors who have received a passing score in a post-training skills assessment
Deliver: Number of near vision eyeglasses distributed by HEWs
Number of HEWs who have utilized AI-powered decision support (HEP Assist)

chart_types: Actuals-vs-target trend by fiscal year and quarter (Power BI line/column visuals)
Bar and line charts grouped by theory-of-change level

liberia.title: Liberia KPI Dashboard

Cross Cutting: Number of community and frontline health workers supported by Last Mile Health and its government partners to provide quality community-based primary healthcare services
Population of the communities with improved access to quality, community-based primary healthcare through Last Mile Health and its government partners
Strengthen: Community health system strengthened through technical advisory investments in leadership, governance, and management
Fidelity to National Community Health Policy
Percent of counties with current secured financial investments for the NCHP for the next six months
Number of CHAs who have received eCBIS training and equipment
Percentage of eCBIS-trained CHAs who have submitted at least one digital report in the previous calendar month
Total number of treatments delivered annually for malaria, diarrhea, and ARI by CHAs in children under 5 years nationally
Number of routine/home visits provided nationally
Upskill: Number of unique CHAs who have been trained in the iCCM module of the revised competency-based NCHP curriculum
Percentage of CHAs who have received a passing score on the post-training assessment for iCCM
Deliver: Number of malaria treatments delivered by CHAs to children <5 years
Number of diarrhea treatments delivered by CHAs to children <5 years
Number of pneumonia treatments delivered by CHAs to children <5 years
Percent of births that occurred in a health facility
Percentage of newly recruited CHAs in LMH managed network who are female
Percentage of LMH-managed CHSSs who have submitted at least one digital report into DHIS2 in the previous calendar month

chart_types: Actuals-vs-target trend by fiscal year and quarter (Power BI line/column visuals)
Bar and line charts grouped by theory-of-change level

Strengthen: LMH supports MOH in developing and deploying a digital Integrated Community Health Information System (iCHIS)
Number of HSAs/SHSAs who have been oriented to iCHIS and received at least one iCHIS module
Percentage of trained HSAs/SHSAs who have reported data into iCHIS during the quarter
Percentage of HSAs/SHSAs in LMH-supported districts who have received quarterly iCHIS supervision visits
Upskill: Number of CHWs who have completed a full training module on the HBP components
Percentage of CHWs who have received a passing score in a post-training knowledge assessment
Percentage of CHWs who have received a passing score in a post-training skills assessment
